gaps_union: Investor overlap disclosure obligation regarding strategic partner conflicts
No stockholder voting covenant obligating holders to vote their shares to elect the designated board members
No joinder or accession mechanism for future holders of Series A Preferred Stock to become parties to this Agreement
No conflict-of-interest or investor overlap disclosure provision addressing a strategic partner scenario
No provision governing amendment of this Agreement
Founder share vesting and company repurchase rights upon termination
Enforceable stockholder voting covenant to elect board designees
General provisions for amendment, waiver, notices, entire agreement, severability, and assignment
